# Product Escalation – Veteran-Facing Issue

Use this template to escalate veteran-facing issues to Product/Engineering. Complete all sections to support efficient triage.

## 1. Short Description
Provide a concise summary of the issue.

## 2. Timeline of Issue
- **First reported:**  
- **Ongoing? (Yes/No):**  
- **Date range of impacted cases, if known:**  

## 3. Severity
- [ ] High — Widespread impact or blocking critical functionality
- [ ] Medium — Limited impact or workaround exists
- [ ] Low — Minor issue or cosmetic

## 4. Slack Thread
- **Link:**  

## 5. Supporting Evidence
- **Screenshots:**  
- **Screen recordings:**  
- **Logs:**  
- **ICNs / Case IDs:**  

## 6. Additional Context
Include any other information that would help Product/Engineering triage this issue.
